span.p:
Worker (1 of 1)
Sync worker class
Single process

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CONSTRAINT: --workers 1
1. scoped_session is thread-local
2. Valkey connection sharing
3. RLS context per-request
4. Audit chain sequential

span.p:
ProxyFix Middleware
x_for=1, x_proto=1
x_host=1, x_prefix=1

Service Layer

span.p:
Event: 'begin'
SET current_merchant(:mid)
Row-Level Security bridge

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SQLAlchemy Pool
15 base + 25 overflow
= 40 max connections

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PostgreSQL 17
canary database
app | sales | metrics

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Valkey 8
Streams + Cache
DB 0: app, DB 4: streams

span.p:
teardown_appcontext
scoped_session.remove()
Connection returned to pool
